signals.headline: Kerala Assembly Elections Voting Underway on April 9, 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kerala Assembly Elections Voting Underway on April 9, 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Voting is currently in progress for the single-phase Kerala Legislative Assembly elections, alongside Assam and Puducherry, with vote counting scheduled for May 4—far from confirmed results or resolutions.[2][4] BJP released its election manifesto promising Rs 3,000 monthly pensions for needy women/widows/seniors

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (Below Consensus of 2.3-2.4%), Driven by Oil but Curbed by Fuel Caps | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's consumer price index rose 2.2% year-on-year in March 2026, up from 2.0% in February but undershooting market forecasts of 2.3-2.4%, with monthly prices up 0.3% versus expected 0.6%[1][2][3].

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with traders assigning 97% odds to resolution by December 31, 2026, amid $121M+ volume across 1346 X markets; no specific whale bets or X posts detailed in real-time data.[1]

signals.headline: No Recent Announcements or Resolutions Impacting Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Recent Announcements or Resolutions Impacting Markets | NO | HIGH confidence**  
No breaking confirmations, announcements, or resolutions noted that would shift odds; markets like "SCOTUS accepts sports event contract case by...?" (46% by Dec 31) and X-specific ones (e.g., Nikita Bier out as X Head of Product) show ongoing trading without resolution triggers.[1][2]
